title: Garden Route Dam level 45,36 %
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS -  The latest dam level update, supplied by George Municipality on 20 January:

Garden Route Dam Level

- Dam level: 45,36 %  (Compared to 43.48% on 13 January)
- Rainfall: 57.5 mm (Measured from 13 - 19 January)

Haarlem Dam Level

- Dam level: 29,00 % (Compared to 30,42 % on 13 January)
- Rainfall: 23 mm (Measured from 13 - 19 January)

The Level 2D water restrictions implemented currently can be found here.


> The cooperation of all users of municipal water is essential and is greatly appreciated.


Households are limited to 10 kilolitres per month under Level 2D.


> Use above this limit will be billed at Level 3 Emergency Tariffs.


Small daily savings, shorter showers, fewer washes, using grey water, can make a big difference.

Garden Route Dam as it currently looks. Photo: Michelle Pienaar

Report leaks or misuse:

- 044 801 9262 / 66 | 044 801 6300
- Violations: 044 801 6350 | 044 801 6300

Previous articles:

- Garden Route Dam level at 43,48%
- Garden Route Dam level at 46,63%
- Garden Route Dam level at 47.65%
- Garden Route Dam level at 49.43%
- Garden Route Dam level at 50,98%

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
